name: Healthcare
description: Clean, accessible, trust-signaling medical theme. Calming blues and teals on warm white backgrounds. WCAG AAA compliant with full CVD support. Designed for patient portals, clinical dashboards, and health monitoring interfaces.

decorators.health-card: White card with subtle shadow and large 12px radius. Clean, spacious padding for medical content readability.
decorators.health-metric: Large prominent number with color-coded status dot indicator. Used for vitals, lab results, and patient stats.
decorators.health-badge: Rounded pill badge with tinted semantic background. Always includes text label for accessibility.
decorators.health-alert: Left-border severity stripe (4px) with tinted background. Color indicates severity: info, warning, critical.
decorators.health-surface: Warm white background with minimal 1px border. Creates gentle separation without harsh contrast.
decorators.health-status: Color-coded status with always-visible text label. Never relies on color alone per WCAG guidelines.
decorators.health-input: Large input with generous 14px padding. Clear focus ring for accessibility. Designed for clinical data entry.
decorators.health-nav: Clean spacious navigation with generous spacing. Clear active states and focus indicators.

dashboard.description: Patient dashboard with sidebar navigation. Vitals overview, appointments, medication schedule, and health metrics.

patient-portal.description: Patient-facing portal with top navigation. Simplified interface for appointments, records, and messaging.

auth.description: Centered authentication forms with clean card styling. HIPAA-compliant login with MFA support.

marketing.description: Healthcare marketing pages with trust signals. Professional hero sections and feature grids.

clinical.description: Clinical data entry and review. Dense but readable layouts with large inputs and clear labels.

health-card.description: White card with subtle shadow and large 12px radius. Clean, spacious padding for medical content readability.
health-card.intent: Use for all content containers in healthcare interfaces. The white background and soft shadow create a clean, clinical feel that builds patient trust.

health-metric.description: Large prominent number with color-coded status dot indicator. Used for vitals, lab results, and patient stats.
health-metric.intent: Use for displaying vital signs, lab values, and key health metrics. The large number ensures readability at a glance; the status dot gives immediate visual triage.

health-badge.description: Rounded pill badge with tinted semantic background. Always includes text label for accessibility.
health-badge.intent: Use for status indicators throughout healthcare interfaces. The pill shape is friendly and non-threatening; tinted backgrounds maintain readability while conveying status.

health-alert.description: Left-border severity stripe (4px) with tinted background. Color indicates severity: info (blue), warning (amber), critical (red).
health-alert.intent: Use for clinical alerts, notifications, and important messages. The left border stripe provides quick severity recognition without overwhelming the interface.

health-surface.description: Warm white background with minimal 1px border. Creates gentle separation without harsh contrast.
health-surface.intent: Use as the root background and for section containers. The warm white creates a calming, clinical environment that reduces anxiety.

health-status.description: Color-coded status with always-visible text label. Never relies on color alone per WCAG guidelines.
health-status.intent: Use for any status indicator that must be accessible to all users including those with color vision deficiencies. Always pair color with a text label or icon.

health-input.description: Large input with generous 14px padding. Clear focus ring for accessibility. Designed for clinical data entry.
health-input.intent: Use for all form inputs in healthcare interfaces. The generous sizing reduces input errors in clinical settings; the prominent focus ring aids keyboard navigation.

health-nav.description: Clean spacious navigation with generous spacing. Clear active states and focus indicators.
health-nav.intent: Use for primary navigation in healthcare apps. Spacious layout reduces mis-taps; clear active states help orientation in complex clinical workflows.
